title: Selenipedium × clonius
taxonomy: Selenipedium × clonius is a hybrid orchid species, belonging to the genus Selenipedium within the family Orchidaceae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered a hybrid between two species of Selenipedium. As a hybrid, Selenipedium × clonius does not have a fixed binomial nomenclature. However, it is often classified as a hybrid between Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium palmifolium or another Selenipedium species, depending on the specific parentage. This classification can make it challenging to determine the exact botanical name for the species.
